subcodes.first_line: O celestial daughter! For some time, no letter hath been received from thee save one shared with the dear daughter of Mrs [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دختر ملکوتی چندی است که از شما نامه ای جز نامه مشترک با دختر عزیز مسیس
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
